commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a default-off Gateway `/v1/responses` config option that emits built-in tool-start events as audit-only `function_call` output items in JSON and SSE, with schema, docs, tests, and changelog updates.

Reproducibility: yes. for the source-level gap: current main has no config flag and both JSON and SSE `/v1/responses` paths ignore built-in `tool/start` events. I did not run tests because this review was constrained to read-only inspection, but the current code path is clear.
commands.review_followup: No repair job is needed because the PR has no concrete blocking defect from this review; it is awaiting normal maintainer feature review or merge.
